sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Joannes Alexandrinus</hi> Grammaticus [Jo.Alex. vel Jo.Gramm.] <date TEIform="date">vi A.D.</date> Idem qui Philoponus (q.v.). Compendium <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ διαλέκτων,</foreign> ed. O. Hoffmann, <title_ TEIform="title">Die griechischen Dialekte</title_> ii, Göttingen 1893, p. 204. [Jo.Gramm.<title_ TEIform="title">Comp.</title_>] <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τονικὰ παραγγέλματα.</foreign> ed. W. Dindorf, Leipzig 1825. [Jo.Alex.]</item>
